king Yudhisthira was ruling over the earth. The commencement
of the Saka era took place 2526 years after the period of that
monarch.
[There is difference of opinion among scholars with regard to
the interpretation of According to some it means the beginn-
ing of the Vikrama era, and according to others the Salivahana

162 Bfhat Samhita
era, and some others hold that it refers to the Buddha era. The
year of the Mahabharata War ranges from 950 B.C. to 3201 B.C.
in the opinions of different scholars from Pargitcr to Mankad. On
the basis of the planetary positions mentioned in the Great Epic as
as well as the day of Bhisma's departure i.e. 8th Tithi ruled by
the star Rohinl in the bright fortnight of the lunar month Magha
at noon at the commencement of the winter solstice, astronomers
have fixed the commencement of the Kaliyuga at 3102 B.C. and
the Great War at 3138 B.C. For according to the Kaliyuga
started on the very day that the Lord Krsna closed His incarnation.
